welcomeSubtitle: AI-powered mind map and knowledge management platform
congratulations: Congratulations! You've learned all core features
completionHint: Now you can start your DeepMindMap journey

intro.title: Project Introduction
content: **DeepMindMap** is a conversation-driven AI mind-mapping tool. It turns dialogue into structured visual thinking, helping you capture ideas, organize knowledge, and explore complex problems with AI assistance.
**Core capabilities** include:
- **AI integration**: Connect to models from OpenAI, Zhipu, DeepSeek, and more for intelligent suggestions and brainstorming.
- **Branched conversations**: Each node can have its own chat thread, so ideas can grow in parallel without losing context.
- **Visual thinking**: Transform abstract thoughts into clear mind-map structures with nodes, relations, and layouts.
- **Workspace isolation**: Keep different projects or teams separated in independent workspaces.
**Typical use cases**: personal note-taking, project planning, team brainstorming, research analysis, and collaborative knowledge building.

canvas.title: Mind Canvas
content: The **Mind Canvas** is your main workspace for building and exploring knowledge maps.
**Basic operations**:
- **Create nodes**: double-click on empty space, right-click to open the context menu, or start a new conversation.
- **Edit nodes**: click a node to rename it, change its summary, or adjust its style.
- **Connect nodes**: draw relations between ideas to show structure and meaning.
- **Expand / collapse**: focus on one branch at a time by collapsing unrelated parts of the map.
**Advanced features**:
- **Multi-select mode**: select several nodes at once to move, group, or batch-edit them.
- **Auto layout**: automatically arrange messy maps into clean hierarchical structures.
- **Zoom / pan**: navigate large maps smoothly with mouse wheel zoom and drag-to-pan.

chat.title: AI Chat System
content: DeepMindMap's AI chat is tightly bound to each branch of your mind map. Every node has its own isolated conversation context, while child nodes inherit the conversation history from their parent.
**Core features**:
- **Streaming output**: watch AI replies appear word-by-word in real time.
- **Context inheritance**: child nodes carry parent context forward, so the AI remembers what you have already discussed.
- **Multi-model support**: switch between OpenAI, Zhipu, DeepSeek, or other configured providers per chat.
- **File upload**: attach documents or images to enrich the conversation.
**Utility commands**:
- **Extract conclusion**: let the AI summarize the key takeaways of a branch.
- **Regenerate title**: automatically create a clearer node title from the chat content.
- **Clear conversation**: reset the current node's chat history when needed.

nodes.title: Nodes & Relations
content: Nodes are the building blocks of every mind map in DeepMindMap.
**Node types**:
- **Root**: the central topic of the map.
- **Branch**: intermediate nodes that split into further sub-topics.
- **Leaf**: terminal nodes that hold final ideas or conclusions.
- **Composite**: a special node that aggregates multiple selected nodes into one unified unit.
**Relation types**:
| Relation | Meaning |
| parent-child | hierarchical ownership |
| supports | one node backs another |
| contradicts | one node opposes another |
| prerequisite | one node must come before another |
| elaborates | one node explains another in more detail |
| references | one node cites or links to another |
| conclusion | one node summarizes or follows from another |
| custom | define your own semantic relation |
Use these relations to keep the meaning between ideas clear and precise.

tools.title: Tool Panel
content: The **left tool panel** gives you quick access to search, history, and file management.
**Search**:
- Search across node titles, summaries, and chat content.
- Click any result to locate the matching node directly on the canvas.
**History**:
- Records your recent operations.
- Use **Undo** and **Redo** to step backward or forward through changes.
- Shortcuts: `Ctrl + Z` to undo, `Ctrl + Y` to redo.
**File management**:
- **Import**: bring existing work into DeepMindMap from JSON or Markdown files.
- **Export**: save your current map as JSON or Markdown for backup or sharing.

workspace.title: Workspace & Messages
content: **Workspaces** keep your projects isolated from one another. Each workspace has its own maps, members, and settings.
**Workspace operations**:
- **Create / join**: start a new workspace for a project, or join an existing one with an invite code.
- **Switch**: move between workspaces quickly from the workspace selector.
- **Public / private**: control whether a workspace is visible to invited members only or discoverable by others.
**Message center**:
- Receive system notices and workspace update notifications.
- Stay aware of unread reminders so you never miss important changes.

settings.title: Settings & Personalization
content: Adjust DeepMindMap to fit your workflow and preferences.
**UI settings**:
- **Language**: switch between supported languages.
- **Chat panel width**: resize the chat sidebar to your comfort.
- **Auto-open chat**: open the chat panel automatically when starting a conversation.
- **Performance mode**: reduce visual effects on lower-end devices.
- **Welcome message**: toggle the welcome greeting on startup.
**API configuration**:
- Add models from OpenAI, Zhipu, DeepSeek, or compatible providers.
- Set a custom API key and base URL for full control.
- Optionally use the built-in service when you prefer not to manage keys manually.

tips.title: Tips & Best Practices
content: **Quick start suggestions**:
- Start with a central topic and let AI help you expand branches.
- Keep node titles short and move details into summaries or chat threads.
- Use relations to make the structure self-explanatory.
**Using AI effectively**:
- Ask specific questions to get more useful answers.
- Explore different branches for alternative ideas.
- Regularly extract conclusions to capture key takeaways.
**Common shortcuts**:
| Action | Windows / Linux | macOS |
| Undo | `Ctrl + Z` | `Cmd + Z` |
| Redo | `Ctrl + Y` | `Cmd + Shift + Z` |
| Delete | `Delete` | `Backspace` / `Delete` |
| Select all | `Ctrl + A` | `Cmd + A` |
| Copy / paste | `Ctrl + C` / `Ctrl + V` | `Cmd + C` / `Cmd + V` |
**Data security**:
- API keys are stored locally in your browser.
- Export your maps regularly to keep backups.
- Remember that public workspaces are visible to other users.
**Getting help**:
- Reopen this guide anytime from the settings menu.
- Use the feedback entry to report issues or suggest improvements.
